title: cistus vulgaris var. heterophyllus
intro: Cistus vulgaris var. heterophyllus, also known as the Mediterranean Rockrose, is a shrubby perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Cistus vulgaris var. heterophyllus include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as promoting wound healing and soothing skin irritations. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to utilize its medicinal properties, and it is also used in traditional herbal remedies to support skin health and immune function.
